policy.forecast_grid_v1_scope: SPX_NDX_plus_KOSPI_when_krx_exact_weights_available_inputs_only; proxy grids stay nested under proxy_inputs_v1
policy.kospi_weight_method: KRX KOSPI issuer MKTCAP / total KOSPI MKTCAP when available
policy.kospi_etf_proxy_policy: EWY/MSCI Korea is diagnostics-only and must not be used as KOSPI RIM weights
policy.proxy_input_policy: ETF proxy inputs are not exact index substitutes and must not set publication_ready.
